channel_id.description: A unique 5 digit ID that is generated by the SpotX publisher platform when a channel is created

ad_unit.description: Token that describes which ad unit to play: instream or outstream

outstream_function.description: Custom function to be used as a renderer.

outstream_options.description: Object to set options on the SpotX renderer. See [outstream_options Object](#spotx-outstream-options-object)

secure.description: Boolean identifying whether the requests should be https or not (used to override the protocol if the page isn't secure).

mimes.description: List of MIME types to allow in ad.

ad_volume.description: Value between 0 and 1 to denote the volume the ad should start at

price_floor.description: Set the current channel price floor in real time.

hide_skin.description: Set to true to hide the SpotX skin

custom.description: An object containing key-value pairs for reporting. See SpotX documentation.

min_duration.description: Minimum video ad duration in seconds

max_duration.description: Maximum video ad duration in seconds

placement_type.description: Number corresponding to the type of ad placement. See SpotX documentation.

position.description: Number corresponding to the position of the ad. See SpotX documentation.

page.description: The URL of the page the ad is being displayed on. Used to override the detected referrer if necessary
